THE FEATURES

Three things AvaTok does for you.

☎

AI Receptionist

✓Never miss a call. Ava answers on your behalf and takes voice messages for you.
✓Ava holds a short, natural conversation with the caller so nothing important slips through.
🔢

Private AvaTok Number

✓Stop exposing your real phone number. Other apps leak it — AvaTok doesn't.
✓Generate your own AvaTok number and share it freely with friends or business contacts.
✓Anyone on the AvaTok network can dial your AvaTok number and reach you directly.
✓No more scammers tracking you down through your private line.
🧠

AI-Powered Messaging

✓Chat privately with Ava AI — your personal AI brain.
✓Instantly find old files or revisit past conversations you've had with others.
✓Ava watches your chats so you don't have to: set reminders, get smart suggestions, and auto-reply while you're away.
✓Use AI right inside any conversation — upload a file and ask #ava anything about it.
✓Pull in documents from your Google and Microsoft apps without leaving the chat.
✓Works in both group and private chats — fetch emails or documents on the spot.
✓Send emails directly as you chat, no app-switching required.
🧠 YOUR LIFE, REMEMBERED

Ava is your memory bank.

Upload the memories that matter, set reminders, auto-tag your photos and videos, and blog your life as you live it — all in one private place that's truly yours.

And if memory ever fails — through dementia or illness — your life is still here: a personal record you and your loved ones can lean on.

📥 Upload memories 🏷 Auto-tag photos & videos 📔 Blog your life ⏰ Reminders that matter
📅 Your timeline
🏷 Tagged 24 photos · "Summer '25"
🎙 Voice memory · Grandma's recipe
📔 Blog · "The day we moved in"
🔒 Stored on your Google account
TWO WAYS TO CALL HER

@ava is a secret. #ava is for everyone.

@
@ava
PRIVATE · SECRET

Summon Ava just for you. Your request and her reply stay hidden from everyone else in the chat. Your backstage AI.

You type: @ava is this offer legit?
↳ only you see Ava's answer
#
#ava
PUBLIC · SHARED

Call Ava for the whole room. Her answer posts publicly to the thread — perfect for group plans, recaps and decisions.

Anyone types: #ava summarize today's plan
↳ everyone sees Ava's answer
🔒 YOUR ACCOUNT, YOUR DATA

Ava is just the signal. You keep everything.

AvaTOK is a signaling service — like a switchboard, not a vault. Every file, message and record runs on your own Google account. We use Google's services under your account for everything that's yours. Our servers keep nothing.

🗂 Stored in your Google Drive 🚫 Nothing on our servers 🔑 You hold the keys
Your Google account
💬 Chats & history
📷 Photos & files
🩺 Records & keys
AvaTOK only passes the signal ↓
AvaTOK servers
store nothing ✓
{ } OPEN TO READ

No black boxes. Come read our code.

Trust shouldn't be a promise you just have to take. Our app's code is open for you to read — see for yourself how Ava signals, how Guardian flags risks, and how @ava stays private. Source-available, so you can look under the hood any time.

⌥ Browse the repo → ★ Star us
avatok / signal.js 
// we route, we don't keep
export async function route(msg) {
  const acct = user.googleAccount;
  await acct.drive.save(msg);
  // 🔑 your account, your data
  return { stored: false };
}
